prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Audit Flask's session-cookie handling. Find the Python source files in pallets/flask that (1) create and load the secure cookie session, (2) configure cookie security attributes such as HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite, and domain/path settings, and (3) sign or verify session data before it is trusted.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the flask-web-framework fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Audit Flask's session-cookie handling. Find the Python source files in pallets/flask that (1) create and load the secure cookie session, (2) configure cookie security attributes such as HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite, and domain/path settings, and (3) sign or verify session data before it is trusted.

params.search_pattern: session cookie OR SameSite OR HttpOnly OR Secure
